---
title: "sefnc_week12_v6"
subtitle: "`sefnc_week12_v6`"
description: "sefnc_week12_v6"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/sefnc_week12_v6/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                         | Title                        | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                                  |
|------------------------------|------------------------------|--------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                      | The unique name of the event | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                           |
| `center`                     | Research center              | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                        |
| `sefnc_when_tired_v6`        | sefnc_when_tired_v6          | string | Participant's confidence in following their diet when feeling tired. Self-reported by participant. Week 12 (V6).                                             |
| `sefnc_during_crisis_v6`     | sefnc_during_crisis_v6       | string | Participant's confidence in following their diet during or after a personal crisis. Self-reported by participant. Week 12 (V6).                              |
| `sefnc_when_depressed_v6`    | sefnc_when_depressed_v6      | string | Participant's confidence in following their diet when feeling depressed. Self-reported by participant. Week 12 (V6).                                         |
| `sefnc_when_anxious_v6`      | sefnc_when_anxious_v6        | string | Participant's confidence in following their diet when feeling anxious. Self-reported by participant. Week 12 (V6).                                           |
| `sefnc_on_vacation_v6`       | sefnc_on_vacation_v6         | string | Participant's confidence in following their diet while on vacation. Self-reported by participant. Week 12 (V6).                                              |
| `sefnc_when_busy_v6`         | sefnc_when_busy_v6           | string | Participant's confidence in following their diet when they have a heavy workload. Self-reported by participant. Week 12 (V6).                                |
| `sefnc_when_missed_goals_v6` | sefnc_when_missed_goals_v6   | string | Participant's confidence in following their diet when they have not met their dietary goals. Self-reported by participant. Week 12 (V6).                     |
| `sefnc_no_support_v6`        | sefnc_no_support_v6          | string | Participant's confidence in following their diet when lacking support from family or friends. Self-reported by participant. Week 12 (V6).                    |
| `sefnc_ubusy_schedule_v6`    | sefnc_ubusy_schedule_v6      | string | Participant's confidence in following their diet when their schedule is busy or resource- and/or time-demanding. Self-reported by participant. Week 12 (V6). |

: Fields in the `sefnc_week12_v6` resource.
